summary: Frontend testing of all new features: game mode selection page, multi-team mode, tournament mode, GMP button redesign, and routing updates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 features tested and passing. Game mode select page at /mode has 3 buttons (standard/multi/tournament). Multi-team mode with 3 teams (فريق أ/ب/ج) navigates to /multi-game showing 3 columns with لوحة المضيف pill button. Tournament with 4 teams navigates to /tournament/bracket showing rounds and match buttons. All data-testid attributes present and working.

test_results.2_mode_page_3_buttons: PASS - mode-standard-btn, mode-multi-btn, mode-tournament-btn all found
test_results.7_multi_setup_inputs: PASS - multi-team-1/2/3-input present (4th only shows when 4 teams selected)
test_results.10_tournament_team_inputs: PASS - tournament-team-1 through 4 present for 4-team mode
test_results.12_bracket_page: PASS - shows rounds (نصف النهائي, النهائي) and match buttons
test_results.13_gmp_pill_button: PASS - لوحة المضيف pill button visible in multi-game bottom right
test_results.15_multi_game_3_columns: PASS - 3 columns with فريق أ/ب/ج visible
